column1: # recommend_aliases.tsv — manual alias map for the recommendation lookup index.
# One row per surface form the automatic rules (de-invert "X, The", de-accent,
# strip apostrophes/punctuation, drop a trailing " Band") can NOT derive.
#   Alias     = a spelling someone might type, or that a service uses
#   Canonical = any name that already resolves in the index (the build script
#               normalizes it, so exact spelling/case/accents don't matter)
# Lines beginning with # are ignored. Re-run build_recommend_index.py after edits
# (or just let the GitHub Action regenerate it on commit).
# Examples of what does NOT need an entry (handled automatically):
